ability.name: Power Shot
ability.description: When units are between 4 and 6 tiles away, shoots Power Shot dealing 50% bonus damage. Has 1 tile extended range.

ability.name: Wind Aura
ability.description: Produces an 8x9 area of wind that slows enemies by 30% and speeds up allies by 30%. Wind lingers for 2 seconds after death.

ability.name: Berserker Rage
ability.description: Every attack, attack speed and movement speed increases by 30% for 3 seconds

ability.name: Vampire Healing
ability.description: Every time they attack, they heal themselves with two healing pulses. The healing can overheal them, allowing their hitpoints to reach up to double of their initial ones.

ability.name: Charge Damage and Knockback
ability.description: Once charging, deals damage to troops in path with knockback. Bounces back from buildings to repeatedly attack target.

ability.name: Bouncing Bomb
ability.description: After the initial throw, the bomb bounces twice, 2.5 tiles apart in a straight line, dealing the same damage as the initial hit

ability.name: Barrage
ability.description: After deployment, shoots 9 cannonballs in 2 rows dealing area damage and knockback

ability.name: Poison Darts
ability.description: When attacking a target, leaves an area of poison that gets stronger after multiple attacks (1-4-7 darts for stages)

ability.name: Infinite Chain Lightning
ability.description: Attack chains to up to 2 targets within 4 tiles, then infinitely bounces between all remaining troops with reduced damage and speed

ability.name: Axe Smash
ability.description: Units within 3.5 tiles receive extra damage and are knocked back

ability.name: Shrapnel Sparks
ability.description: Projectile breaks into 5 shrapnel pieces that leave sparks dealing damage over time

ability.name: Hot Spawns
ability.description: When attacking, spawn speed decreases to 2.4 seconds and spawns Fire Spirits to the sides instead of front

ability.name: Rolling Snowball
ability.description: Extends slow duration by 1 second, pulls affected troops inside and rolls 4.5 tiles on ground, making trapped troops untargetable during roll

ability.name: Mirror Barrel
ability.description: Launches a second barrel to the mirroring tile in the other lane that spawns 3 Decoy Goblins

ability.name: Cage Trap
ability.description: Pulls ground troops within 3 tiles into the cage where they are attacked directly and become untargetable

ability.name: Resurface
ability.description: When hitpoints reach 66% and 33%, the Goblin Drill resurfaces nearby, leaving Goblins behind each time it's destroyed

ability.name: Goblin Swarm
ability.description: When below 50% hitpoints, spawns a Goblin every 2.2 seconds

ability.name: Net Trap
ability.description: Throws a net at the closest unit that freezes them in place, preventing movement and attacks, and allows ground units to hit them

ability.name: Ice Blast
ability.description: 3 seconds after hitting an enemy, deals the same stun and damage to the enemy for 1.1 seconds with 0.5 tiles larger splash radius

ability.name: Persistent Charge
ability.description: After defeating a troop, maintains current damage stage for 9 seconds or until stunned. After 20 seconds of damage, reaches 4th stage dealing twice the damage of 3rd stage. Charge is not reset by knockback or pull effects.

ability.name: Damage Reduction Shield
ability.description: Receives 60% less damage from all sources while not attacking

ability.name: Ghost
ability.description: When the Lumberjack dies, his ghost spawns with unlimited health, cannot be targeted by troops/buildings/towers, lasts 5.5 seconds, and deals the same damage as the original Lumberjack

ability.name: Uppercut
ability.description: Every attack launches the targeted troop 4 tiles towards the nearest enemy Crown Tower

ability.name: Goblin Spawn
ability.description: Every attack spawns a Goblin and has 1 second faster hit speed

ability.name: Sniper Shots
ability.description: After deployment, gains 3 infinite-range attacks targeting the closest troop or building in front of her, dealing 1.8x damage

ability.name: Butterfly Heal
ability.description: When P.E.K.K.A defeats a unit, heals 3.5%-15% of original hitpoints based on defeated unit's HP. Can overheal up to 50% more than max hitpoints.

ability.name: Souldiers
ability.description: When attacking while invisible, spawns 2 Souldiers that deal spawn damage on deployment and do not despawn naturally

ability.name: Recoil Damage
ability.description: Every time he attacks, he deals damage in a 2.5 tile radius around him and knocks back enemy ground troops by 1 tile

ability.name: Flying Deploy
ability.description: Deploy as flying troops unable to be attacked by ground-targeting troops. Upon attacking or taking damage, fall to ground dealing area damage on impact.

ability.name: Charge
ability.description: After their shield is destroyed, they gain the ability to charge towards their target after traveling 2.5 tiles, dealing 2x damage if they hit the target whilst charging

ability.name: Shadow Resurrection
ability.description: When Skeletons are defeated, they spawn as untargetable shadows. All shadows are defeated when General Gerry dies.

ability.name: Double Barrel Drop
ability.description: Spawns with 2 barrels, each containing 7 Skeletons. First barrel drops when reaching 75% HP, second barrel drops on death.

ability.name: Skeleton Spawn
ability.description: Every time they attack, an additional Evolved Skeleton spawns, for a maximum total of 8 Skeletons

ability.name: Electric Pulse
ability.description: After surfacing and deployment, spawns an expanding electric pulse that deals high damage and stuns all enemies in a 6-tile radius for 0.5 seconds

ability.name: Tornado
ability.description: Every time she attacks, a Tornado appears for 0.5 seconds, pulling all units towards her and dealing damage within a 5.5 tile radius

ability.name: Runner Spawn
ability.description: When defeated, spawns a Runner that targets buildings and deals area damage

ability.name: Skeleton Death Heal
ability.description: Heals when spawned skeletons are defeated, can overheal up to 24% more hitpoints

ability.name: Fire Shield
ability.description: Deploys with a shield that prevents death in 1 attack. When shield is destroyed, pushes back all pushback-capable troops within 3 tiles by 3 tiles and deals high damage.

ability.name: Growing Zap Pulse
ability.description: After initial hit, creates a second zap pulse that grows radius by 0.5 tiles and deals same damage and stun

ability.name: Heroic Hurl
ability.description: Grabs the highest HP enemy troop within 2 tiles and throws them horizontally, dealing impact damage when they land. Thrown troops become untargetable by ground units while airborne.

ability.name: Snowstorm
ability.description: Creates 3 pulses in 4-tile radius that slow enemies by 30% for 2 seconds each, deal damage, and freeze enemies for 2 seconds if they remain for all pulses

ability.name: Triumphant Taunt
ability.description: Taunts all enemy troops and buildings in a 7.5-tile range for 5 seconds and gains a shield

ability.name: Breakfast Boost
ability.description: Heals 30% and gains 1-5 levels based on pancake meters (filled by attacking or time)

ability.name: Trusty Turret
ability.description: Places a turret 3 tiles forward that lasts 10 seconds

ability.name: Fiery Flight
ability.description: Takes flight and fireballs gain 3 tile radius tornado effect that deals damage
